privileged_info_summary: Verified that the target output GPX file path, 8-hour max driving limit, and exact coordinates for Port of Boston (42.3400, -71.0400) and Chicago Rail Yard (41.8100, -87.6300) are explicitly enforced by the verifier logic. The waypoints are intended to be synthetic. A severe structural bug exists: the task is missing both its pre_task (setup_task.ps1) and post_task (export_result.ps1) hooks. Consequently, the waypoints are never actually imported, and the verifier will always return a score of 0 because it strictly requires 'C:\tmp\task_result.json' which is never generated.
